articles.description: Rory McIlroy has added a rare Masters defence to the career Grand Slam - now he is aiming to keep climbing the all-time list of major victories.
articles.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters: Where does he rank alongside Jack Nicklaus and Tiger Woods?

articles.description: Masters reaction as Rory McIlroy becomes one of the game's greats by holding off the world's best to become only the fourth man to win successive titles.
articles.title: Masters reaction as McIlroy emulates Woods, Nicklaus and Faldo by retaining title at Augusta

articles.description: All the latest Premier League reaction as Manchester City closed the gap on leaders Arsenal to six points before they meet at the Etihad Stadium next Sunday.
articles.title: Premier League title race LIVE: Man City win taking advantage of Arsenal's defeat

articles.description: Paris-Roubaix's remains elite's sport's most volatile journey of daring and dust. And the Hell of the North is the one race legend Tadej Pogacar still can't win.
articles.title: Paris-Roubaix: How a brutal race still thwarts Tadej Pogagcar

articles.description: Sunderland say racist abuse of forward Brian Brobbey on social media highlights the "ongoing and unacceptable frequency of this behaviour".
articles.title: Brian Brobbey: Sunderland condemn racist abuse on social media

articles.description: Justin Rose says his latest run at the Masters was the "chance that got away" after falling short at Augusta once more.
articles.title: Justin Rose: The Masters 'that got away' as 13-year major drought goes on

articles.description: Follow live text updates and listen to BBC Radio commentaries from six games across Division One and Two of the County Championship.
articles.title: County Championship Cricket LIVE: Scores & radio commentaries from six games

articles.description: Wayne Rooney says Manchester City have the psychological edge over leaders Arsenal in the Premier League title race.
articles.title: Premier League title race: Manchester City have psychological edge over Arsenal, says Wayne Rooney

articles.description: Nikola Jokic scores 23 points in the first half as the Denver Nuggets beat the San Antonio Spurs 128-118 to claim third seed in the Western Conference.
articles.title: NBA play-offs: Nikola Jokic stars as Denver Nuggets take third seed in Western Conference

articles.description: England midfielder Keira Walsh is set to make her 100th appearance against world champions Spain at Wembley.
articles.title: Keira Walsh: How crucial is 99-cap midfielder to the Lionesses?
